text:
Tried with FreeBSD-14.0-CURRENT-arm64-aarch64-RPI-20221224-c89209c674f2-259842.img.xz

but always get rainbow screen. 

Copied bcm2710-rpi-3-b.dtb to bcm2710-rpi-zero-2-w.dtb, rainbow screen.

Copied bcm2710-rpi-zero-2-w.dtb from a current bullseye sd, rainbow screen.

What am I missing?
